message:
feat: enforce primitives-on-subagents-only (spec §D.11 option b)

Agents that have a delegate tool no longer get primitive tools.
Primitives are only available to leaf agents that don't delegate.
This enforces the "agents all the way down" pattern — delegating
agents think in goals, leaf agents execute with primitives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
